title: Category Registry
description: Central registry for all car categories in carspecio platform

categories.name: Deportivos
categories.description: High-performance sports cars focused on speed and driving dynamics
categories.descriptionEn: High-performance sports cars focused on speed and driving dynamics

categories.name: SUV
categories.description: Sport Utility Vehicles with higher ground clearance and spacious interiors
categories.descriptionEn: Sport Utility Vehicles with higher ground clearance and spacious interiors

categories.name: Eléctricos
categories.description: Fully electric vehicles powered by batteries
categories.descriptionEn: Fully electric vehicles powered by batteries

categories.name: Sedán
categories.description: Traditional three-box passenger cars with separate trunk
categories.descriptionEn: Traditional three-box passenger cars with separate trunk

categories.name: Hatchback
categories.description: Compact cars with rear door that opens upwards including rear window
categories.descriptionEn: Compact cars with rear door that opens upwards including rear window

categories.name: Compactos
categories.description: Small cars ideal for city driving and fuel efficiency
categories.descriptionEn: Small cars ideal for city driving and fuel efficiency

categories.name: Familiar
categories.description: Family-oriented vehicles with extra space and seating capacity
categories.descriptionEn: Family-oriented vehicles with extra space and seating capacity

categories.name: Pickup
categories.description: Trucks with open cargo bed for work and utility purposes
categories.descriptionEn: Trucks with open cargo bed for work and utility purposes

categories.name: Híbridos
categories.description: Vehicles combining internal combustion engine with electric motor
categories.descriptionEn: Vehicles combining internal combustion engine with electric motor

categories.name: Lujo
categories.description: Premium vehicles with high-end features and luxury materials
categories.descriptionEn: Premium vehicles with high-end features and luxury materials
